2606.14368.title: Be My Tutor: On-Policy Co-Distillation for Mutual LLM Improvement via Peer Feedback
2606.14368.paper_summary: We study multi-domain LLM training in which two models, each stronger in a different domain, co-evolve by tutoring each other through on-policy feedback. Unlike one-way distillation or single-model fine-tuning, our goal is mutual Pareto improvement: each model improves across domains without losing its original strength. To this end, we propose On-Policy Co-Distillation (OPCoD), where each student's self-distillation is conditioned on its own correct rollout and feedback from its peer. To make feedback exchange effective, OPCoD uses cognizance-based gating to decide when to give feedback and feedback anchoring to ground feedback in the problem. On Science Q\&A tasks, OPCoD consistently outperforms baselines and achieves Pareto improvement across all evaluated domain pairs and students.
2606.14368.paper_summary_zh: 我們研究多領域 LLM 訓練，其中兩個模型在不同領域各自更強，通過政策反饋互相輔導而共同演化。與單向蒸餾或單模型微調不同，我們的目標是互惠的 Pareto 改進：每個模型在不同領域中改進，而不失去其原有的優勢。為此，我們提出了政策共同蒸餾（OPCoD），其中每個學生的自我蒸餾是基於其自身的正確展開和來自同伴的反饋。為了使反饋交換有效，OPCoD 使用基於認知的閘控來決定何時給予反饋，以及反饋錨定來將反饋與問題相結合。在科學問答任務中，OPCoD 始終超越基線，並在所有評估的領域對和學生中實現 Pareto 改進。
2606.14368.author: Woohyeon Byeon et.al.
2606.14368.authors: Woohyeon Byeon, Jiwon Jeon, Jeonghye Kim, Youngchul Sung
